name: python3-passwordmeter
title: python3-passwordmeter
description:
Password Strength Meter (Python 3)
This package contains a configurable, extensible password strength measuring
library.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use pwm because Password Strength Meter (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use pwm as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `pwm [options] [args]` as documented upstream for pwm.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair pwm with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `pwm --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
